text:
Once upon a time in a little cottage by a forest, there lived a young girl named Holly. She loved birds more than anything else. Every spring, she'd sneak out early in the morning to listen to the cheerful songs of new arrivals.

One day, Holly found a book about different bird calls. She spent hours reading it every night, and something special happened. During a big storm one autumn evening, a loud, beautiful song filled Holly's room. Looking out the window, she saw a flock of red-eyed vireos singing in the huge oak tree.

Every dawn after that, Holly went to the oak tree. She'd listen carefully until they flew away. Some days they sang her morning songs, and other days they just hummed. Over time, Holly got really good at recognizing their tunes.

One day, while listening to an old song she didn’t recognize, she felt a strange deep connection. She stayed awake late into the night, piecing together the words. When dawn
